RKSI-SID-BINIL3C.name: BINIL3C
notes: This record intentionally duplicates fix and segment data so each procedure can be reviewed independently.
Coordinates are extracted from RKSI SID/STAR chart coding tables where available; altitude/speed/path-terminator fields are reserved for row-level table parsing.
